import os
import numpy as np
os.environ["HF_HUB_OFFLINE"] = "1"
from VLABench.envs import load_env
env = load_env("add_condiment")
np.random.seed(42)
env.reset()
obs = env.get_observation(require_pcd=False)
print(f"ee_state shape: {np.array(obs['ee_state']).shape}")
print(f"ee_state: {np.array(obs['ee_state'])}")
